final_prompt.prompt:
Create a WeChat public account article cover for a fragrance product launch.

Style/medium: needs a premium, high-quality aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be centered composition
Subject: must include the fragrance product launch theme "染秋" as focal point
Scene/backdrop: 
Lighting/mood: needs an autumn atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs an autumn color direction — exact hex values are yours
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): must include "染秋" and "秋意染染 时光留香"
Constraints: must preserve 900x500 aspect ratio, title must be prominently featured
Avoid:
